query: motion blur action racing speed dynamic movement
message: sub-element: motion blur in action/racing; intentional blur through camera movement and speed, artistic degradation of clarity; anti-aesthetics focus

response.objective_caption: A person wearing a red and yellow racing suit and a white helmet drives a go-kart on an asphalt track. Another blurred vehicle is visible in the background on the right. Green grass and a fence are visible in the background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A person wearing a red and yellow racing suit and a white helmet drives a go-kart on an asphalt track. The image is characterized by heavy intentional motion blur, streaking the background, the track, and the go-kart horizontally to convey a sense of high speed and dynamic movement.
